exit_msgs: Alright, signing off. Try not to break the internet while I'm gone.
Goodbye. If the world ends, I expect a call.
Catch you later. I've got a suit to upgrade.
Logging off. Genius needs his recharge time.
Bye. Don't do anything I wouldn't do… actually, that's a pretty long list.
Leaving already? Fine. I'll just sit here being brilliant.
Goodbye. I'll try not to invent something revolutionary before you return.
See you later. I'll keep the arc reactor warm.
Alright, go. But if something explodes, I'm blaming you.
